name: Forest
motivation: Protecting its territory from those who wander too deep

features.name: Canopy Stalker
features.effect: Attacks made from elevated terrain or trees have advantage.

features.name: Root Net
features.effect: Once per combat, may cause roots to erupt beneath a creature within reach range. Target must succeed a Physical check or be Restrained until end of their next turn.

name: Tundra
motivation: Hunting scarce prey across a harsh frozen land

features.name: Frozen Coat
features.effect: Resistant to cold damage. Immune to the Frozen condition.

features.name: Blizzard Surge
features.effect: When in an open outdoor environment, may spend an action to create a 10 ft radius snow squall. Creatures inside have disadvantage on ranged attacks until the start of this creature's next turn.

name: Desert
motivation: Guarding a rare water source or oasis

features.name: Heat Endurance
features.effect: Ignores difficult terrain from sand or extreme heat. Never suffers the Exhausted condition from environmental heat.

features.name: Sand Strike
features.effect: Once per round, may kick up a cloud of sand as part of a melee attack. On hit, target must also succeed an Agility check or be Blinded until end of their next turn.

name: Coastal
motivation: Feeding from tide pools and stalking the shallows

features.name: Amphibious
features.effect: Breathes air and water equally. Does not suffer movement penalties in shallow water.

features.name: Undertow Pull
features.effect: On a successful melee hit while in water, target must succeed a Physical check or be dragged 10 ft toward deeper water.

name: Abyssal
motivation: Rising from crushing depths to hunt surface dwellers

features.name: Deep Pressure
features.effect: Ignores all effects of water pressure. Has darkvision in underwater environments.

features.name: Crushing Grip
features.effect: When this creature grapples a target, the target takes [[1d4]] Impact damage at the start of each of its turns while grappled.

name: Swamp
motivation: Ambushing prey drawn by the smell of rot and decay

features.name: Bog Camouflage
features.effect: In swamp or marsh terrain, attacks against this creature have disadvantage.

features.name: Fetid Aura
features.effect: Creatures that start their turn within reach must succeed a Survival check or gain the Sickened condition until they move out of range.

name: Cavernous
motivation: Nesting deep in the dark, guarding its clutch from light-bringers

features.name: Darkvision
features.effect: Sees perfectly in complete darkness. Immune to the Blinded condition from magical darkness.

features.name: Tremorsense
features.effect: Detects any creature touching the ground within reach range, even through walls and rock.

name: Urban
motivation: Scavenging the discarded remnants of civilization

features.name: Crowd Cover
features.effect: While in an area with 3 or more non-hostile creatures, attacks targeting this creature have disadvantage.

features.name: Scavenge
features.effect: Once per short rest, may find or improvise a weapon, shield, or useful item from surrounding debris. Narrator determines what is available.

name: Ruins
motivation: Bound by ancient oath or lingering curse to guard against all who enter

features.name: Ancient Ward
features.effect: At the start of combat, gains [[PL * 2]] temporary armor that lasts until destroyed.

features.name: Haunt
features.effect: Once per combat, may flicker and reappear up to 20 ft away as a free action, appearing as though it briefly ceased to exist.

name: Highland
motivation: Defending the high ground as sovereign, unchallenged territory

features.name: Sure-Footed
features.effect: Immune to difficult terrain from rocky or elevated surfaces. Cannot be knocked Prone by wind or Impact on mountainous terrain.

features.name: Dive Strike
features.effect: If this creature moves at least 20 ft downward before attacking, the attack deals +[[1d6]] damage and target must succeed a Physical check or be knocked Prone.

name: Volcanic
motivation: Drawn to geothermal heat, feeding on magma flows

features.name: Heat Body
features.effect: Creatures that hit this creature with a melee attack take [[1d4]] Fire damage from the heat.

features.name: Magma Plating
features.effect: Immune to fire damage. Resistant to physical damage from non-magical weapons.

name: Steppe
motivation: Migrating across open plains, following the herd or the season

features.name: Open Field Sprint
features.effect: May move an additional 15 ft when moving in a straight line on open terrain without obstacles.

features.name: Stampede
features.effect: Once per combat, may move up to full speed in a straight line. Every creature in its path must succeed a Physical check or be knocked Prone and take [[1d6]] Impact damage.

name: Arcane Touched
motivation: Drawn to sources of magical power to feed, guard, or corrupt

features.name: Spell Resistance
features.effect: When targeted by a spell, may make a Spirit check. On a success, reduce the spell's damage or effect by half.

features.name: Arcane Leech
features.effect: When a spell is cast within short range, this creature gains [[1d4]] temporary wounds.

name: Mechanized
motivation: Executing its last programmed directive without pause or mercy

features.name: Iron Frame
features.effect: Immune to Poison and Disease conditions. Has additional [[PL * 2]] armor.

features.name: Overclock
features.effect: Once per combat, may take an additional off-action on its turn.

name: Crystal Bound
motivation: Defending the crystal formation it was born from or bonded to

features.name: Crystal Shell
features.effect: When struck by a physical attack, the attacker takes [[1d4]] Piercing damage from crystal fragments.

features.name: Resonance
features.effect: Crystal and Arcane damage dealt by this creature ignores [[PL]] points of armor.

name: Vozian
motivation: Furthering Vozian will - spreading its influence across the living world

features.name: Vozian Resilience
features.effect: Immune to fear and charm effects. Cannot be moved against its will by spells.

features.name: Infect
features.effect: On a successful melee hit, target must succeed a Survival check or gain the Corrupted condition for 1 hour.

name: Timeworn
motivation: Trapped between moments, lashing out at anything that disturbs its fractured timeline

features.name: Phase Step
features.effect: Once per round, may teleport up to 15 ft as a free action.

features.name: Time Anchor
features.effect: At the start of its turn, roll a d6. On a 1, it acts twice this turn. On a 6, it skips its turn entirely.

name: Chaos Warped
motivation: Spreading disorder - it exists to unravel structure and reason

features.name: Unstable Form
features.effect: At the start of each turn, roll a d6. 1–2: attacks against it have disadvantage this turn. 3–4: normal. 5–6: attacks against it have advantage this turn.

features.name: Chaos Aura
features.effect: Spells cast within reach of this creature have a 1-in-6 chance to trigger a wild surge effect chosen by the Narrator.

name: Life Surge
motivation: Consuming vitality to sustain its own unnatural existence

features.name: Vampiric
features.effect: When this creature deals damage, it heals for half the damage dealt (rounded down).

features.name: Death Defiance
features.effect: The first time this creature would drop to 0 wounds per day, it instead drops to 1. Once per day.

name: Elemental
motivation: Anchoring its elemental essence to the material plane - it does not belong, and it knows it

features.name: Elemental Nature
features.effect: Immune to environmental effects of its native element. Attacks using that element deal +[[1d4]] additional damage.

features.name: Planar Instability
features.effect: When reduced below half wounds, its elemental attacks deal +[[1d6]] damage but it loses 5 ft of movement each round as it destabilizes.

name: Draconic
motivation: Accumulating power and wealth - every intruder is an insult

features.name: Fearsome Presence
features.effect: At the start of combat, all enemies within short range must succeed a Spirit check or gain the Fear condition for 1 round.

features.name: Dragon Scales
features.effect: Has additional [[PL * 3]] armor. Resistant to the damage type matching its breath weapon.

name: Celestial
motivation: Guarding holy ground - corruption cannot be permitted to touch this place

features.name: Aura of Purity
features.effect: Undead and Corrupted creatures within reach have disadvantage on attacks and Spirit checks.

features.name: Divine Resilience
features.effect: Resistant to Eclipse and Chaos damage.

name: Feral
motivation: Driven by primal hunger and territorial instinct - reason left long ago

features.name: Frenzy
features.effect: When below half wounds, gains advantage on all melee attacks.

features.name: Primal Sense
features.effect: Cannot be surprised. Advantage on all Perception checks.

name: Demonic
motivation: Breaking through to the mortal realm to feast on fear and flesh

features.name: Infernal Resistance
features.effect: Resistant to Fire and Physical damage from non-magical weapons.

features.name: Soul Hunger
features.effect: When this creature kills an enemy, all allied creatures within reach gain [[1d4]] temporary wounds.
